disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Progressive breathlessness on exertion and severe fatigue building over 3-4 months, acutely worse in the last two weeks
trigger_question_examples: What's been happening with your breathing?
How long has this been going on and has it changed recently?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: It's been coming on for a few months but the last two weeks it's really taken off — I get puffed doing almost nothing and I'm exhausted all the time.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Breathlessness when lying flat, relieved by propping up on three pillows
trigger_question_examples: Can you lie flat in bed, or do you need to prop yourself up?
Does your breathing change when you lie down?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I can't lie flat at all now — I have to sleep propped up on three pillows or I feel like I'm suffocating.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Waking at night short of breath with an occasional dry cough
trigger_question_examples: Do you ever wake up in the night gasping or coughing?
Does the breathlessness wake you from sleep?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Some nights I wake up needing to catch my breath, and I get a bit of a dry cough.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Bilateral ankle swelling appearing by the end of the day
trigger_question_examples: Have you noticed any swelling in your legs or ankles?
Do your ankles puff up during the day?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Yeah, my ankles get a bit puffy and swollen by the evening.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Breathlessness now present at rest with a sense of breathing faster than usual, limiting basic daily activities
trigger_question_examples: Are you short of breath even when you're resting?
Can you still do your normal daily activities?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Even sitting here I feel a bit short of breath and like I'm breathing faster, and I just can't do my normal jobs around the house anymore.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: No chest pain and no palpitations reported
trigger_question_examples: Any chest pain, pressure or tightness?
Is your heart racing, pounding or skipping beats?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No, I haven't had any chest pain, and my heart doesn't feel like it's racing or fluttering.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Not taking any regular medicines and no previously known heart or lung diagnosis
trigger_question_examples: Are you on any regular medications?
Have you ever been told you have a heart or lung condition?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I don't take any regular tablets, and no one's ever told me I have a heart or lung problem.
